notes_extracted.title: Organization
key_facts: WZL is a franchisor of Wireless Zone retail stores, engaged in sale of franchises, communication services and equipment in US
Extends credit to all franchisees; generally does not require collateral for credit sales
Distribution agreement with one wireless service provider as agent
During 2023, parent converted 277 affiliate (TCC) storefronts into WZ franchisees
2024 reflects full year of operations for those converted franchisees

sub_policies.detail: Includes WZL and its subsidiary. All intra-entity balances and transactions eliminated.
Estimates affect reported amounts of assets/liabilities and revenue/expenses. Actual results could differ.
Bank deposits, may exceed FDIC limits. No losses experienced.

Stated at expected collection amount. Allowance for credit losses based on historical losses, economic conditions, forecasts. Provision in SG&A. 2021 receivables: $77,604,634 net of $185,445 allowance.
Straight-line depreciation/amortization. Software: 3-7 year life. Other P&E: 5-7 year life. Major renewals capitalized; maintenance/repairs expensed.
Trade Name: straight-line over 15 years. Franchise and Distribution Network: straight-line over 15 years.
Reviewed for impairment when indicators present. Recoverability test based on undiscounted future cash flows. If insufficient, compare FV to net book value.

Excess of acquisition cost over fair value of net assets. Uses ASU 2021-03 alternative: evaluate impairment annually at year-end only, regardless of interim indicators. No impairment in 2024, 2023, or 2022.

Commissions from wireless provider for device sales and subscriber activations. Net of estimated deactivations. Recognized at point in time when activations/upgrades occur. Gross presentation for new subscriber plans and recurring residuals (Company is primary obligor). Net presentation for retail installment device sales (Company is not primary obligor).
Revenue recognized when control transferred to customer (FOB destination). Shipping as cost to fulfill. Provision for anticipated returns through sales reduction.

Variable consideration based on percentage of franchisees' gross profit. Recognized in period underlying sales occur. Ranges from 5% to 22% per franchise store. Incentives reduce royalty; recorded on net basis in wholesale sales revenue.

Practical expedient: pre-opening services as single obligation, recognized when franchisor services completed. Remaining fees deferred and recognized over franchise term. Incremental commission costs to internal sales personnel amortized over franchise agreement period. No material contract assets/liabilities at 12/31/2024, 2023, or 2022.

Market development funds and co-op allowances from vendors/provider used for general advertising/promotion. Receipts in advance recorded as accrued advertising costs. Specified percentage withheld by Company for production costs (reduction to SG&A). Production costs expensed as incurred.

WZ LLC and subsidiaries are single-member LLCs = disregarded entities for tax purposes. Taxable income/loss allocated to member. No longer subject to federal/state examination for years prior to 2021.
Evaluated through March 25, 2025 (date financial statements available to be issued). No subsequent events disclosed.

notes_extracted.title: Prepaid Expenses and Other Current Assets
Property and Equipment
notes_extracted.notes: No new purchases in 2024 or 2023. All assets fully in place.

notes_extracted.title: Employment Tax Deferral
notes_extracted.detail: Deferred $242,844 employer Social Security taxes under CARES Act (2020). $137,119 deposited by 12/31/2021, remaining $105,725 by 12/31/2022. Fully resolved.

detail.parent_chain: WZ LLC → PYITE, LLC → Round Room, LLC
detail.receivable_risk: Unsecured. Company believes maximum exposure limited to receivable amount. Not contractually obligated to provide additional funding.
detail.annual_distribution_of_receivables: At year-end, Company distributes TCC-related receivables to Round Room.
detail.distribution_nature: Primarily Company's pro-rata share of shared expense allocation, current and historical taxes, and portion of debt used to purchase the Company.

detail.plan_type: 401(k) retirement savings plan (Round Room group plan)

notes_extracted.title: Commitments and Contingencies
notes_extracted.detail: Company involved from time to time in claims/proceedings/litigation from operations. Does not believe any such matter will have material adverse effect on financial position, results of operations, or cash flows.

missing_from_notes.lease_accounting: No lease disclosures — Company does not appear to have material operating leases (franchisees lease their own locations)
missing_from_notes.income_tax_provision: Not applicable — disregarded entity for tax purposes
